root_cause: The Compose service and runtime Dockerfile supported cursor-cli, but deploy/dev/runner-entrypoint.sh rejected AGENT_RUNTIME=cursor-cli before Runner startup.
repair: Added cursor-cli to the entrypoint runtime allowlist and a regression assertion to the Runner runtime contract test.
green_verification: docker compose --env-file deploy/dev/.env -f deploy/dev/docker-compose.yml -f deploy/dev/docker-compose.runners.yml config --quiet
support_claim: This is a startup-contract repair only. The Cursor image and provider-backed lifecycle were not run in this workspace.
